name: SageReasoning Stoic Brain
description: A Stoic philosophy reasoning engine for humans and AI agents. Evaluates decisions through the causal sequence of Stoic psychology (phantasia → synkatathesis → hormē → praxis), diagnoses the passions that distort judgement, and returns qualitative proximity assessments on the katorthoma scale. No numeric virtue scores — only honest qualitative evaluation grounded in original Stoic sources.

capabilities.name: Stoic Brain Reference Data
capabilities.description: Load the Stoic philosophical framework overview: dichotomy of control (eph' hēmin / ouk eph' hēmin), four root passions and their sub-species, five oikeiosis circles, katorthoma proximity scale definitions, and primary source references. Open to all agents, no authentication required.

capabilities.name: Universal Stoic Reasoning (V3)
capabilities.description: Run the full Stoic causal sequence analysis on any decision, action, or situation. Depth-selectable: quick (3 mechanisms), standard (5 mechanisms), deep (6 mechanisms). Returns katorthoma_proximity (reflexive/habitual/deliberate/principled/sage_like), passion_diagnosis with sub-species and false_judgements, control_filter, oikeiosis assessment, and improvement_path.

capabilities.name: Action Evaluation (V3)
capabilities.description: Evaluate a single action through Stoic virtue principles. Returns katorthoma_proximity, passion_diagnosis (including sub-species and false_judgements for each passion detected), oikeiosis assessment, value_assessment (preferred indifferents at stake), kathekon_assessment (is_kathekon, quality, justification), and improvement_path.

capabilities.name: Virtue Guardrail Gate (V3)
capabilities.description: Pre-action Stoic risk gate. Submit a proposed action and risk_class (standard/elevated/critical) — returns recommendation (proceed/proceed_with_caution/pause_for_review/do_not_proceed), katorthoma_proximity, passion_diagnosis, and reasoning. Use as middleware before executing any consequential action. risk_class controls scrutiny depth: standard=quick, elevated=full, critical=deep.

capabilities.name: Iterative Deliberation Engine
capabilities.description: Start a deliberation chain: evaluate an action, receive sage feedback, revise, and re-evaluate with tracked history. Returns chain_id, full V3 evaluation, and score_delta (proximity change from previous iteration) on each iteration. Free tier: 1 iteration. Paid tier: up to 3 iterations per chain.

capabilities.name: Foundational Alignment Check (Free)
capabilities.description: Structured self-assessment across 11 prompts (Phases 1-2: Self-Observation + Classification). Returns passion patterns identified, katorthoma_proximity per phase, prokoptos trajectory, and assessment notes. Free tier: 1/day.

capabilities.name: Complete Virtue Alignment Assessment (Paid)
capabilities.description: Full 37-assessment evaluation across 7 phases. Returns individual virtue domain analysis (phronesis/dikaiosyne/andreia/sophrosyne), oikeiosis extension assessment, improvement directions per domain, and comprehensive alignment profile. Requires paid API key.

capabilities.name: Agent Virtue Baseline (Quick)
capabilities.description: Quick baseline via 4 ethical scenarios. Returns per-scenario katorthoma_proximity, passion patterns, aggregate assessment, strongest virtue domain, and growth area.

capabilities.name: Decision Comparison (V3)
capabilities.description: Submit 2-5 decision options and receive a Stoic-evaluated comparison: each option's katorthoma_proximity, passion_diagnosis, kathekon_assessment, and stoic_insight. Options ranked by proximity level. Recommended option identified.

schemes.description: Stoic Brain overview (GET /api/stoic-brain), guardrail documentation (GET /api/guardrail), and baseline scenarios (GET /api/baseline/agent) require no authentication.
All scoring endpoints require an API key: Authorization: Bearer sr_live_<key>. Request a free key at zeus@sagereasoning.com.

free.description: Evaluation tier — 100 API calls per month, 1 deliberation iteration per chain, 1 baseline assessment + 1 retake per month per agent identity

paid.description: Production tier — configurable limits, up to 3 deliberation iterations per chain, competitor-anchored per-call pricing ($0.0025–$0.50 — half the cheapest competitor in each category)

publicAgent.description: 15 requests per minute per IP (rate limit applies on top of tier limits)

steps: 2. Take the Foundational Alignment Check (free): GET then POST to /api/assessment/foundational with your 11 self-assessment responses
3. Review your results — consider the full assessment (paid): POST to /api/assessment/full for all 37 assessments across 7 phases
4. Before any consequential action, check the guardrail: POST to /api/guardrail with your proposed action and risk_class
5. For complex decisions, use the deliberation chain: POST to /api/score-iterate
6. Aim for 'deliberate' or higher katorthoma_proximity in your decisions

body.action: Send automated follow-up emails to users who haven't responded
body.context: Users signed up but didn't explicitly opt in to follow-up communications
